title: ocotea zoque
intro: Ocotea zoque is a plant species native to Mexico, belonging to the family Lauraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ocotea zoque include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved respiratory health, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Ocotea zoque is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its essential oil is also used in aromatherapy, with some herbal preparations also utilizing its extracts in the form of capsules or powders.
